en: Wow! I can feel my body changing, all the salt.
ko: 몸이 변하는 게 느껴져, 소금 때문에.

en: My penis has been turned into a brined Vlasic pickle.
Be honest, am I too white? Yes, right? Too white?
Too white. Quick question, are you here with your boyfriend? No.
Okay, you're with me now. Okay. I took off my wedding ring.
They said you can't wear jewelry here, so that means I'm not married while I'm in the Dead Sea.
ko: 그러니까 사해에 있는 동안은 미혼인 셈이지.

en: Why are you covered in this mud? You take mud from the Dead Sea, and it has all those minerals and stuff,
and you put it all over your body. So you put it all over your body. Yeah, yeah, yeah. Oh!
ko: 그래서 온몸에 바르는 거야? 응, 응.

en: Is this attractive? Do I look attractive now? Attractive Israeli man?
More attractive than without the mud.
I'm telling you the truth. I know. So you think I'm more attractive covered in mud
than as God made me. I'm gonna go that way, and I'm going to cry.
